title: hieracium aurantiacum subsp. hinterhuberi
intro: Hieracium aurantiacum subsp. hinterhuberi is a subspecies of dandelion, specifically a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, Hieracium aurantiacum subsp. hinterhuberi has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and kidney issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve blood circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Hieracium aurantiacum subsp. hinterhuberi is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
